2605.03701.title: SERE: Structural Example Retrieval for Enhancing LLMs in Event Causality Identification
2605.03701.paper_summary: Event Causality Identification (ECI) requires models to determine whether a given pair of events in a context exhibits a causal relationship. While Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong performance across various NLP tasks, their effectiveness in ECI remains limited due to biases in causal reasoning, often leading to overprediction of causal relationships (causal hallucination). To mitigate these issues and enhance LLM performance in ECI, we propose SERE, a structural example retrieval framework that leverages LLMs' few-shot learning capabilities. SERE introduces an innovative retrieval mechanism based on three structural concepts: (i) Conceptual Path Metric, which measures the conceptual relationship between events using edit distance in ConceptNet; (ii) Syntactic Metric, which quantifies structural similarity through tree edit distance on syntactic trees; and (iii) Causal Pattern Filtering, which filters examples based on predefined causal structures using LLMs. By integrating these structural retrieval strategies, SERE selects more relevant examples to guide LLMs in causal reasoning, mitigating bias and improving accuracy in ECI tasks. Extensive experiments on multiple ECI datasets validate the effectiveness of SERE. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/DMIRLAB-Group/SERE.
2605.03701.paper_summary_zh: 事件因果識別（ECI）需要模型來判斷在特定上下文中給定的一對事件是否存在因果關係。儘管大型語言模型（LLMs）在各種自然語言處理任務中表現出色，但由於因果推理中的偏見，它們在ECI中的有效性仍然有限，這常常導致因果關係的過度預測（因果幻覺）。為了減輕這些問題並提升LLM在ECI中的表現，我們提出了SERE，一個結構性範例檢索框架，利用LLMs的少量學習能力。SERE引入了一種基於三個結構概念的創新檢索機制：（i）概念路徑度量，通過ConceptNet中的編輯距離來測量事件之間的概念關係；（ii）句法度量，通過句法樹上的樹編輯距離來量化結構相似性；以及（iii）因果模式過濾，根據預定的因果結構使用LLMs過濾範例。通過整合這些結構檢索策略，SERE選擇更相關的範例來指導LLMs進行因果推理，減輕偏見並提高ECI任務的準確性。在多個ECI數據集上進行的廣泛實驗驗證了SERE的有效性。源代碼可在 https://github.com/DMIRLAB-Group/SERE 上公開獲取。
2605.03701.author: Zhifeng Hao et.al.
2605.03701.authors: Zhifeng Hao, Zhongjie Chen, Junhao Lu, Shengyin Yu, Guimin Hu, Keli Zhang, Ruichu Cai, Boyan Xu
